Home / Services / Wrought Iron Fences

Wrought Iron Fences

Elegant, durable security with timeless appeal.

Wrought iron fences offer a combination of security, beauty, and longevity unmatched by other fencing materials. Ideal for the diverse architectural styles found in Long Beach, from the historic Craftsman homes of Belmont Shore to the modern waterfront developments, wrought iron adds a touch of sophistication while providing a robust barrier against intruders. Our wrought iron fences are custom-designed and fabricated to your exact specifications, ensuring a perfect fit for your property and aesthetic preferences.

We use only the highest-quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen to create fences that are not only beautiful but also built to last. Our wrought iron fences are treated with a protective coating to resist rust and corrosion, ensuring years of trouble-free performance in Long Beach's challenging coastal environment. We also offer a variety of decorative options, including ornamental scrolls, finials, and custom gates, to further enhance the beauty and functionality of your fence.

From initial design to final installation, our team will work closely with you to ensure your complete satisfaction. We handle all aspects of the project, including permitting, site preparation, and post-installation cleanup. Invest in the timeless elegance and enduring security of a wrought iron fence from Go Iron Works Inc.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Design: We discuss your needs, preferences, and budget, and create a custom design for your wrought iron fence.
  2. 02 Step 2: Fabrication: Our skilled craftsmen fabricate your fence using high-quality materials and time-tested techniques.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation: Our experienced team installs your fence with precision and care, ensuring a secure and long-lasting installation.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing: We apply a protective coating to resist rust and corrosion, ensuring years of trouble-free performance.

Benefits

  • Enhanced Security
  • Increased Property Value
  • Timeless Beauty
  • Customizable Designs

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does it take to install a wrought iron fence?

The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project, but typically ranges from a few days to a week.

Are wrought iron fences expensive?

Wrought iron fences are a premium fencing option, but their durability and longevity make them a worthwhile investment in the long run.

Do you offer custom gate designs?

Yes, we offer a wide variety of custom gate designs to match your fence and enhance your property's curb appeal.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with wrought iron fences? Contact us today.
